name: Post-Hoc Reasoning in Chain of Thought: Decoding and Steering Pre-Committed Answers

description: arXiv:2603.01437v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: As chain of thought (CoT) has become central to scaling reasoning capabilities in large language models (LLMs), it has also emerged as a promising tool for interpretability, suggesting the opportunity to understand model decisions through verbalized reasoning. However, the utility of CoT toward interpretability depends upon its faithfulness---...
author: Kyle Cox, Darius Kianersi, Adri\`a Garriga-Alonso
